subcodes.first_line: O son of that wise and martyred man! From the city of Malden, I am determined to journey to Montreal, Canada, in North America [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن الرجل الرشید الشهید از شهر مالدن مصمم عزیمت بمنتریال قنادا شمال امریکا
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God
